_: Step-3 (Tagging) attribution-mass bars on methods.html. While empirical:false the page shows illustrative placeholder proportions that encode the MEASURED direction (the clinical share of the circuit falls under patient wording; the off-target share rises), with a caption that discloses they are illustrative. When the backend aggregates the corpus, set empirical:true and fill clinical/patient with {clin,off,struct} percentage shares (each object summing to 100); the page then renders those numbers inside/under the bars and captions it 'Mean attribution mass across the measured corpus.' Do not set empirical:true until the shares are real means.
